description: Generated Base lifecycle policies for this repository.

hooks.command: if command -v base >/dev/null 2>&1 && base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'pre-tool' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' >/dev/null 2>&1; then base '__hook' 'pre-tool' '--target' 'codex' '--default-branch' 'main' || printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}}'; else printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}}'; fi
hooks.commandWindows: $b = Get-Command base -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($b) { & base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'pre-tool' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & base '__hook' 'pre-tool' '--target' 'codex' '--default-branch' 'main'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}}' } } else { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}}' } } else { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Base hook runtime is missing or incompatible"}}' }

hooks.commandWindows: $b = Get-Command base -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($b) { & base '__hook' 'capabilities' '--require-feature' 'policy' '--require' '>=0.2.0, <0.3.0' *> $null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { & base '__hook' 'policy' 'session-context' '--target' 'codex' } }; exit 0
